examples: When Mary starts talking, no one else can get a word in edgeways.
You'll only get the desk through the door if you turn it edgeways.
He talks so much that no one else can get a word in edgeways.
Mr Verhofstadt's crime, it seemed, was that he talks too much: at previous joint appearances, he had not allowed Mr Prodi to get a word in edgeways.
But you didn't let him get a word in edgeways.
